findings.description: The first demo test pass did not include a whitespace-only project name regression test.

evidence.summary: Initial test set covered empty, too-long, and valid names but missed whitespace-only input.

findings.required_fix: Add a test proving whitespace-only project names fail.

repair_instructions: Add only the missing whitespace-only project name test.
disallowed_scope: Do not change production code unless the missing test reveals a real failure.
